examples: Thus, identifying risk factors contributing to CHD is important to public health.
The older they were, the more patients treated the risk of CHD as a normal part of getting older.
White, but not black, infants who showed exposure to ethyl benzene had four times the risk of CHD.
The UK has one of the highest death rates from CHD and stroke in Europe.
Snacking on high fat, high calorie foods and smoking can increase your risk of CHD.
